message:
feat(web): add dedicated OG/Twitter share images for /core-flywheel

The /core-flywheel page (formerly /core_flywheel) had no opengraph-image
or twitter-image convention files of its own, so it inherited the root
homepage's generic share image. When shared on social platforms, the
preview card showed the homepage graphic instead of something relevant
to the core flywheel content.

Added:
- app/core-flywheel/opengraph-image.tsx (1200x630, edge runtime)
- app/core-flywheel/twitter-image.tsx   (1200x600, edge runtime)
- New "/core-flywheel" entry in lib/social-image-routes.ts with
  flywheel theme, "The 3-Tool Core Loop" badge, and Agent Mail /
  Beads / bv tags

Both image files use the shared createSocialImage() utility with the
"flywheel" palette for visual consistency with the /flywheel page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,15 @@ const STATIC_ROUTE_SOCIAL_DATA: Record<string, SocialImageData> = {
     theme: "default",
     tags: ["Claude", "Codex", "Gemini"],
   },
+  "/core-flywheel": {
+    badge: "The 3-Tool Core Loop",
+    title: "The Core Flywheel",
+    description:
+      "The beginner-friendly entry point: Agent Mail for coordination, br for task management, and bv for graph-aware triage.",
+    path: "/core-flywheel",
+    theme: "flywheel",
+    tags: ["Agent Mail", "Beads", "bv"],
+  },
   "/flywheel": {
     badge: "20+ Interconnected Tools",
     title: "The Agentic Coding Flywheel",
